commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: Jesus is transfigured11He instructeth his disciples concerning the coming of Elias: 14casteth forth a dumb and deaf spirit: 30 foretelleth his death and resurrection: 33exhorteth his disciples to humanity: 38 bidding them not to prohibit such as be not against them, nor to give offence to any of the faithful.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Deservedly, therefore, even while in the flesh, did the Lord show Himself to him, the colleague of His own fasts, no less than to Elijah.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
